seoTitle: Murrumba vs Murweh — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murrumba and Murweh. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrumba and Murweh.
heading: Murrumba vs Murweh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrumba, Queensland and Murweh, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murrumba has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Murweh (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrumba or Murweh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrumba has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Murweh scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrumba scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Murweh scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrumba or Murweh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murrumba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
